name: Invesco Perpetual Select Trust plc - Balanced Risk Allocation Share Portfolio
summary: Invesco Perpetual Select Trust plc - Balanced Risk Allocation Share Portfolio is an investment trust that invests in a diversified portfolio of assets, including equities, fixed income, and alternative investments, to achieve a balanced risk profile. The trust aims to provide shareholders with capital growth and income. It is managed by Invesco Fund Managers Limited.
